---
title: Check your PDF accessibility
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{check-you-pdf-app}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
    message: false
---

This page lets a user upload a PDF, send it to the accessibility API, and open the returned HTML report in a new browser tab.

```{=html}
<style>
.pdfcheck-app {
  margin: 1.5rem 0 2rem;
}

.pdfcheck-card {
  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #ffffff;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.04);
}

.pdfcheck-card {
  padding: 1.25rem;
}

.pdfcheck-label {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #111827;
}

.pdfcheck-input {
  position: absolute;
  width: 1px;
  height: 1px;
  padding: 0;
  margin: -1px;
  overflow: hidden;
  clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
  white-space: nowrap;
  border: 0;
}

.pdfcheck-upload {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-height: 2.75rem;
  padding: 0.7rem 1rem;
  border: 1px solid #d1d5db;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f9fafb 100%);
  color: #111827;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: border-color 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease, transform 120ms ease;
}

.pdfcheck-upload:hover,
.pdfcheck-upload:focus-visible {
  border-color: #9ca3af;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.08);
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.pdfcheck-file {
  display: none;
  margin: 0.85rem 0 0;
  color: #4b5563;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

.pdfcheck-file.is-visible {
  display: block;
}

.pdfcheck-actions {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  gap: 0.9rem;
  align-items: center;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.pdfcheck-actions > * {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

.pdfcheck-button,
.pdfcheck-download {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.55rem;
  min-height: 2.75rem;
  padding: 0.7rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: transform 120ms ease, box-shadow 120ms ease, background 120ms ease, border-color 120ms ease;
}

.pdfcheck-button {
  border: none;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1f2937 0%, #111827 100%);
  color: #ffffff;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.14);
}

.pdfcheck-button:hover,
.pdfcheck-button:focus-visible {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #111827 0%, #000000 100%);
  transform: translateY(-1px);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.16);
}

.pdfcheck-button:disabled {
  opacity: 0.7;
  cursor: wait;
  transform: none;
  box-shadow: none;
}

.pdfcheck-download {
  border: 1px solid #d1d5db;
  color: #111827;
  background: #ffffff;
}

.pdfcheck-download:hover,
.pdfcheck-download:focus-visible {
  border-color: #9ca3af;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.pdfcheck-download[hidden] {
  display: none;
}

.pdfcheck-status {
  display: none;
  margin-top: 0.9rem;
  padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

.pdfcheck-status.is-visible {
  display: block;
}

.pdfcheck-status--info {
  background: #f3f4f6;
  color: #111827;
}

.pdfcheck-status--error {
  background: #fef2f2;
  color: #991b1b;
}

.pdfcheck-spinner {
  width: 0.95rem;
  height: 0.95rem;
  border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35);
  border-top-color: #ffffff;
  border-radius: 999px;
  animation: pdfcheck-spin 0.8s linear infinite;
}

.pdfcheck-spinner[hidden] {
  display: none;
}

@keyframes pdfcheck-spin {
  to {
    transform: rotate(360deg);
  }
}
</style>

<div class="pdfcheck-app">
  <form id="pdfcheck-form" class="pdfcheck-card">
    <label class="pdfcheck-label" for="pdfcheck-file-input">PDF file</label>
    <input
      id="pdfcheck-file-input"
      class="pdfcheck-input"
      type="file"
      accept=".pdf,application/pdf"
    >

    <div id="pdfcheck-file" class="pdfcheck-file" aria-live="polite"></div>

    <div class="pdfcheck-actions">
      <label class="pdfcheck-upload" for="pdfcheck-file-input">Choose PDF</label>
      <button id="pdfcheck-submit" class="pdfcheck-button" type="submit">
        <span id="pdfcheck-submit-spinner" class="pdfcheck-spinner" hidden></span>
        <span id="pdfcheck-submit-label">Send to API</span>
      </button>
      <a
        id="pdfcheck-download"
        class="pdfcheck-download"
        href="#"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener noreferrer"
        download
        hidden
      >
        Download HTML
      </a>
    </div>

    <div id="pdfcheck-status" class="pdfcheck-status" aria-live="polite"></div>
  </form>
</div>

<script>
(() => {
  const endpoint = "https://pdfcheck-api-4i9ct.ondigitalocean.app/accessibility";

  const form = document.getElementById("pdfcheck-form");
  const input = document.getElementById("pdfcheck-file-input");
  const fileBox = document.getElementById("pdfcheck-file");
  const submit = document.getElementById("pdfcheck-submit");
  const submitLabel = document.getElementById("pdfcheck-submit-label");
  const submitSpinner = document.getElementById("pdfcheck-submit-spinner");
  const status = document.getElementById("pdfcheck-status");
  const download = document.getElementById("pdfcheck-download");

  let selectedFile = null;
  let reportUrl = null;

  const formatSize = (bytes) => {
    if (!Number.isFinite(bytes) || bytes <= 0) {
      return "unknown size";
    }

    const units = ["B", "KB", "MB", "GB"];
    const power = Math.min(Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(1024)), units.length - 1);
    const value = bytes / 1024 ** power;
    return `${value.toFixed(value >= 10 || power === 0 ? 0 : 1)} ${units[power]}`;
  };

  const clearDownload = () => {
    if (reportUrl) {
      URL.revokeObjectURL(reportUrl);
      reportUrl = null;
    }

    download.hidden = true;
    download.removeAttribute("href");
    download.removeAttribute("download");
  };

  const setStatus = (tone, message) => {
    status.className = `pdfcheck-status pdfcheck-status--${tone} is-visible`;
    status.textContent = message;
  };

  const setLoading = (loading) => {
    submit.disabled = loading;
    submitSpinner.hidden = !loading;
    submitLabel.textContent = loading ? "Waiting for report..." : "Send to API";
  };

  const validateFile = (file) => {
    if (!file) {
      return "Choose a PDF before sending the request.";
    }

    const isPdf = file.type === "application/pdf" || /\.pdf$/i.test(file.name);
    if (!isPdf) {
      return "Only PDF files are accepted.";
    }

    return null;
  };

  input.addEventListener("change", () => {
    const [file] = Array.from(input.files || []);
    const error = validateFile(file);

    if (error) {
      selectedFile = null;
      fileBox.className = "pdfcheck-file";
      fileBox.textContent = "";
      setStatus("error", error);
      return;
    }

    selectedFile = file;
    fileBox.className = "pdfcheck-file is-visible";
    fileBox.textContent = `${file.name} (${formatSize(file.size)})`;
    status.className = "pdfcheck-status";
    status.textContent = "";
  });

  form.addEventListener("submit", async (event) => {
    event.preventDefault();

    const error = validateFile(selectedFile);
    if (error) {
      setStatus("error", error);
      return;
    }

    setLoading(true);
    clearDownload();

    setStatus("info", "Uploading PDF and waiting for the HTML report...");

    try {
      const formData = new FormData();
      formData.append("file", selectedFile, selectedFile.name);

      const response = await fetch(endpoint, {
        method: "POST",
        body: formData
      });

      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(`The API returned ${response.status} ${response.statusText}.`);
      }

      const html = await response.text();
      reportUrl = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([html], { type: "text/html" }));

      let opened = false;
      const reportWindow = window.open(reportUrl, "_blank");

      if (reportWindow) {
        reportWindow.opener = null;
        opened = true;
      }

      const reportName = selectedFile.name.replace(/\.pdf$/i, "") || "accessibility-report";
      download.href = reportUrl;
      download.download = `${reportName}-accessibility-report.html`;
      download.hidden = false;

      setStatus(
        "info",
        opened
          ? "Report ready. It opened in a new tab."
          : "Report ready. Your browser blocked the new tab, but you can use the download link."
      );
    } catch (error) {
      const message = error instanceof TypeError
        ? "The browser could not reach the API. Check network access or CORS settings on the endpoint."
        : error.message;

      if (reportWindow && !reportWindow.closed) {
        reportWindow.close();
      }

      setStatus("error", message);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  });
})();
</script>
```
